data.title: Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Open Interest Drops 30% From October Peak, Deleveraging May Set Stage for Bullish Recovery
data.description: Bitcoin derivatives markets have undergone a sharp deleveraging over the past three months, a move that analysts say has historically preceded market bottoms and healthier price recoveries.According to data from on-chain analytics firm CryptoQuant, aggregate Bitcoin derivatives open interest (OI) has fallen by roughly 31% since October, signaling a broad unwind of leveraged positions following last year’s volatility.Deleveraging resets market structureCryptoQuant analyst Darkfost described the drop in open interest as a classic deleveraging signal — one that has often marked important inflection points for Bitcoin in past cycles.“Historically, these periods have marked significant bottoms,” Darkfost said, noting that excess leverage being flushed from the system can help reset market structure and create a stronger base for recovery.Open interest measures the total number of outstanding derivatives contracts that remain open across futures and options markets. When OI declines sharply, it typically reflects traders closing positions, forced liquidations, or a reduction in speculative leverage — all of which reduce the risk of cascading sell-offs.Risks remain if prices break down furtherWhile the deleveraging trend is constructive, CryptoQuant cautioned that it does not eliminate downside risk altogether. If Bitcoin were to enter a sustained bear market, open interest could continue contracting, signaling deeper risk aversion and an extended correction.This dynamic played out during the October 10 liquidation event, when excessive leverage amplified downside volatility and accelerated forced selling across derivatives venues.Open interest nearly tripled in 2025The scale of the current reset is notable when viewed in historical context. During the 2025 rally, Bitcoin derivatives activity surged to unprecedented levels.Darkfost noted that Bitcoin open interest reached over $15 billion on Oct. 6, nearly triple the peak seen during the November 2021 bull market, when open interest on Binance topped out near $5.7 billion. The buildup reflected what analysts later described as a speculative frenzy fueled by leverage.Since then, that excess has been steadily unwound.Spot-driven gains reduce downside pressureOne constructive signal for the market is that Bitcoin’s recent price recovery has coincided with declining open interest, a pattern often associated with short covering rather than leveraged long speculation.When prices rise as OI falls, it suggests that bearish traders are being forced out of positions, reducing sell-side pressure. These rallies tend to be more sustainable, as they are driven by spot demand rather than borrowed capital.Bitcoin has gained close to 10% year-to-date, reinforcing the view that current upside is supported by healthier positioning.Derivatives market not fully bullish yetDespite the deleveraging, derivatives markets have not fully transitioned into a structurally bullish phase. Data from CoinGlass shows total Bitcoin open interest across exchanges at roughly $65 billion, down from more than $90 billion in early October — a decline broadly consistent with CryptoQuant’s estimates.On Deribit, the largest concentration of Bitcoin options open interest is clustered at the $100,000 strike, with roughly $2.2 billion in notional value. This positioning indicates bullish expectations, with more call options than puts outstanding.However, derivatives analytics firm Greeks Live cautioned that recent activity still appears reactive rather than trend-defining.“The current trading structure looks more like a response to a sudden surge,” the firm said, adding that longer-term derivatives positioning has yet to confirm a full bull market transition.Bottom lineThe 30% drop in Bitcoin open interest suggests that excess leverage has largely been purged from the system — a condition that has historically supported stronger and more sustainable recoveries. While derivatives markets remain cautious, the combination of reduced leverage and spot-driven demand has improved Bitcoin’s near-term market structure.

data.title: The Smarter Web Company Allocates Shares Under Subscription Agreement
data.description: According to Foresight News, The Smarter Web Company has allocated 3,265,000 ordinary shares under the terms of a subscription agreement. The total proceeds from this allocation amount to £1,673,092 before expenses, equating to approximately £0.51 per share. The company is set to receive about 98.25% of the proceeds upon settlement. The remaining balance of ordinary shares not yet allocated under the subscription agreement stands at 59,975,500 shares.

data.title: WINkLink adds support for $HTX pricing.
data.description: According to official news, WINkLink Oracle, a leading oracle network in the TRON ecosystem, has officially added support for $HTX price services, and $HTX/TRX is now available. This upgrade not only further expands the asset coverage of WINkLink's price services but also continuously strengthens the integrity and reliability of TRON's on-chain data infrastructure, providing more comprehensive and timely market data support for on-chain financial protocols, trading platforms, and developers, thus contributing to the steady development of ecosystem applications.

data.title: Bitcoin Can Hit New Highs in 2026 as Dollar Liquidity Expands, Says Arthur Hayes
data.description:
Arthur Hayes says Bitcoin’s path to new highs depends on renewed dollar liquidity rather than short-term price momentum.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-can-hit-new-highs-in-2026-as-dollar-liquidity-expands-says-arthur-hayes/

data.title: HTX will burn 13.62 trillion tokens in Q4 2025, with a total value exceeding US$23.31 million, representing nearly 10% of the total supply.
data.description: According to the official announcement from HTX DAO, the Q4 2025 $HTX token burn was successfully completed on January 14, 2026. On-chain data shows that a total of 13,616,371,495,327.31 $HTX tokens were burned, with a total value exceeding $23.31 million. To date, HTX DAO has cumulatively burned 99.49 trillion $HTX tokens, nearly 10% of the total issuance, with a total value of approximately $186 million. It is worth noting that despite the relatively sluggish overall market conditions in Q4, the scale of this burn still represents a 36.4% year-on-year increase compared to the same period in 2024. This indicates that Huobi HTX has maintained robust revenue capabilities, providing a solid foundation for the continuation and implementation of the $HTX quarterly burn mechanism. The official statement indicates that the platform will continue to firmly implement the quarterly burn mechanism, continuously enhancing the value support and ecosystem confidence of $HTX through long-term, transparent deflationary arrangements.

data.title: Trader Profits from Leveraged Silver and Gold Positions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 15, Hyperinsight reported that a trader known as the 'largest on-chain gold bull' closed a 10x leveraged long position on xyz:SILVER, which is pegged to the price of silver, securing a profit of $781,000.

Currently, the trader maintains a 5x leveraged long position on 1,500 PAX Gold (PAXG) tokens, with an average entry price of $4,415.46, resulting in an unrealized profit of $270,000. Additionally, the trader holds high-leverage long positions on a basket of on-chain U.S. stock tokens, including Apple, Intel, Oracle, Micron Technology, AMD, and Palantir.

data.title: Republican Senators Express Discontent Over DOJ Investigation of Fed Chair Powell
data.description:
According to Odaily, on January 15, some Republican senators expressed strong dissatisfaction with the U.S. Department of Justice's investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. They are expected to obstruct the nomination of a new Fed chair to uphold the central bank's independence. In response, U.S. President Donald Trump issued a firm reply.

Addressing the opposition within the Republican Party, Trump stated, "I don't care, there's nothing to say. They should remain loyal."

Additionally, Trump dismissed warnings from JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon, who suggested that Trump's interference with the Federal Reserve could increase inflation, saying, "I don't care what he says."

data.title: Trader Successfully Predicts Bitcoin Price Movements, Earning $44,500
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Lookonchain reveals that the trader known as hai15617 has once again successfully predicted Bitcoin price movements using the same strategy, earning $44,500. The trader made 24 predictions in a single day, winning 8 times, resulting in a success rate of 33.33% and a total profit of $136,800.

data.title: Chris Dixon, a16z Partner: The Clarity Act Should Move Forward to Maintain the U.S. Crypto Development Environment
data.description: Chris Dixon, writing on the X platform, stated that crypto developers need clear industry rules. Over the past five years, Republicans, Democrats, and the Trump administration have worked closely with members of the crypto industry to protect decentralization, support developers, and provide equal opportunities for entrepreneurs. The core of this bill aims to achieve these goals. While the bill is not yet perfect and requires amendments before formal legislation, now is the time to move the CLARITY Act forward if the U.S. is to maintain the best crypto development environment globally.

data.title: A major whale's LIT long positions were partially liquidated, resulting in a loss of $509,000.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, as the price of LIT continued to fall, a large whale (0x6c0f...3a62) partially liquidated its 1x leveraged long position in LIT, incurring a loss of $509,000. The whale currently still holds this position, with the next liquidation price at $1.49.

data.title: Chris Dixon Advocates for Clear Regulations in Crypto Development
data.description: According to Foresight News, Chris Dixon, managing partner at a16z crypto, expressed on Twitter that crypto developers require clear regulations. Over the past five years, Republicans, Democrats, and U.S. President Donald Trump's administration have worked closely with the crypto industry to protect decentralization, support developers, and provide fair opportunities for entrepreneurs. Essentially, this legislation aims to achieve these goals. While it is not perfect and requires some amendments before becoming law, Dixon emphasized that now is the ideal time to advance the CLARITY Act to ensure the United States remains a leading force in shaping the future of cryptocurrency globally.

data.title: Semiconductor Stocks Surge in U.S. Markets
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, U.S. semiconductor equipment stocks experienced a significant rise during the night trading session. ASML saw an increase of over 5%, while TSMC rose by more than 4%. This follows TSMC's announcement that its capital expenditure will be higher over the next three years.

data.title: Eric Adams Rejects “Rug Pull” Claims Tied to NYC Token Despite Big Losses
data.description:
Eric Adams has rejected allegations that his NYC Token was linked to suspicious liquidity withdrawals that left investors facing heavy losses.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/eric-adams-rejects-rug-pull-claims-tied-to-nyc-token-despite-big-losses/

data.title: NCAA Urges CFTC to Halt College Sports Prediction Markets
data.description:
According to PANews, the National Collegiate Athletic Association (NCAA) has requested the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to suspend trading in prediction markets related to college sports. The NCAA argues that these markets function similarly to sports betting but bypass the protective measures required for licensed sports betting entities, such as age restrictions, advertising limitations, and integrity monitoring.

Currently, contracts related to college sports on Polymarket have reached a trading volume of approximately $320 million. The association is concerned that these markets, which allow participation from users aged 18 and above, could attract college students and even athletes themselves. Prediction contracts targeting individual athletes could lead to coercion and harassment, posing a "catastrophic" risk to student-athletes and the entire college sports ecosystem.

data.title: ECB Official Warns of Inflation Risks if Fed's Independence is Undermined
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, ECB Governing Council member Kazaks has stated that any weakening of the Federal Reserve's independence could likely lead to higher inflation rates affecting ordinary consumers in the United States. This situation may subsequently result in increased interest rates as a measure to curb inflation.

data.title: Gate's December Transparency Report Released: Transaction Data and On-Chain Ecosystem Show Signs of Growth
data.description: Gate's December Transparency Report shows that several key metrics continued to rise at the end of the year. Gate's global spot market share growth remained among the top three, and its derivatives market share was approximately 11%, leading the industry in annual growth. Gate Launchpool, HODLer Airdrop, CandyDrop, and Launchpad saw nearly 30 projects launched in a single month, with a cumulative prize pool exceeding $3.5 million. In the same month, the number of addresses on the Gate Layer chain surpassed 100 million. These figures collectively illustrate Gate's steadily increasing ecosystem activity. Meanwhile, Gate continues to deepen its global compliance strategy and brand influence. Gate Technology FZE, a subsidiary of Gate Group, has officially launched. As an official sponsor of the Red Bull Racing Formula 1 team, Gate hosted a VIP viewing event during the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix, witnessing the team's victory. These achievements have earned Gate several international awards. The platform was recognized as a “Crypto Industry Benchmark of Excellence” at the 2025 Entrepreneur Middle East Leadership Awards, topped the BeInCrypto 2025 Best Spot Exchange list, was named “Best High-Liquidity Spot Exchange,” and won “Best Centralized Exchange” and “Brand of the Year” at the inaugural BeInCrypto 100 Awards. Gate is consolidating its core competitiveness in the global crypto asset trading market through a multi-dimensional approach encompassing product, compliance, and brand development.
